market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Stay in Leeds' premier luxury home, fully furnished for 4 guests. This spacious property features [insert high-value amenities if available, e.g., 'private garden' or 'onsite parking'—add specific details about unique features like [example architectural detail] or [local landmark proximity]. Just [X minutes] from Leeds' top attractions, this entire home rental delivers exceptional comfort. Recent guests praise [quote positive review element if available]. Ideal for [business travelers/destination weddings/weekend getaways], our property combines modern convenience with [regional特色]. Book direct for [exclusive perk if applicable].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Living room photo as cover image to showcase property scale and style
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is +326% above cohort median while occupancy is 40% below market average (29.3% vs 47.8%)
Title includes "Big Ben" but listing is in Leeds - creates location confusion for searchers
No amenity categories identified despite market demand for outdoor/parking/entertainment features
analysis.outreach_hook: Despite charging 326% above average for Leeds Airbnbs (£659 vs £155), your listing is only 29% booked over the next 90 days compared to 48% for similar properties
